human_explanation: There is nothing anomalous in this video. All pedestrians are walking normally.
ai_explanation: The anomalous activity involves a person in a red shirt riding a small personal vehicle (possibly a scooter), which begins in snippet 10 and continues through snippet 19. This activity stands out as it deviates from the expected pedestrian behavior of walking on a sidewalk, leading to higher anomaly scores in the later snippets.

scores.justification: The AI incorrectly identifies an anomaly where there is none according to the human explanation. It provides a specific scenario involving a person in a red shirt on a vehicle, demonstrating detail, but fails to recognize the absence of any anomaly. The explanation is well-written and clear.
